query: SELECT CONCAT('id=', id, ' away=', awayTeam, ' home=', homeTeam, ' date=', gameDate, ' time=', IFNULL(startTimeEst,'null'), ' status=', gameStatus) as info FROM games WHERE awayTeam IN ('long_beach_state','hawaii') OR homeTeam IN ('long_beach_state','hawaii') LIMIT 5;
